description:
Legal record (#22) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f. 6r of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated 17 Adar 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(Document #22) Partnership in which the father of a motherless orphan, invests funds on behalf of his young daughter Esther (כסף בתורת עסקא מנכסי בתו היתומה קטנה). Esther's father, the widower Nissim Ḥayyūn, invests a total of 2,000 medin with a certain Yiṣḥaq Castro, who hands over a variety of jewelry items as collateral for the investment. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
